description: Extract the station-elevation geometry of the most upstream cross-section from the Muncie HEC-RAS model HDF file at '/home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie/Muncie.p04.hdf'. Compute geometric hydraulic properties (Flow Area, Wetted Perimeter, Top Width, Hydraulic Radius) at 25 evenly-spaced water surface elevations ranging from the thalweg to the maximum bank elevation. Save the results to '/home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/stage_area_curve.csv' with columns 'Stage', 'FlowArea', 'WettedPerimeter', 'TopWidth', and 'HydraulicRadius'. Save a summary text file containing the River Station identifier and number of points to '/home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/cross_section_info.txt'. Generate a 2x2 multi-panel plot of these properties vs. Stage and save it to '/home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/stage_area_plot.png'. Use Python (h5py, numpy, pandas, matplotlib) for the analysis.
